name: RadiFi Credit Union - Westside Branch
description_short: RadiFi Credit Union's Westside Jacksonville branch offers membership-based banking with checking, savings, loans, and mortgage services. Serving the community since 1935 with competitive rates and personalized member support.
description_long: RadiFi Credit Union – Westside Branch has been serving the Jacksonville community for nearly 90 years, establishing itself as a local financial institution rooted in the historic Westside neighborhood. Located at 7254 103rd Street in Jacksonville, Florida, the branch specifically markets itself to families, military members, and water enthusiasts in the area, with proximity to Naval Air Station Jacksonville and local waterfront amenities. The organization operates as a member-owned cooperative credit union rather than a traditional for-profit bank. The branch provides comprehensive retail banking services including deposit accounts, cash transactions, loan products, and mortgage origination. Current promotional offerings include a 13-Month Certificate at 3.75% APY (minimum $2,500), High-Yield Checking up to 4.00% APY, auto loan refinancing with 0.25% rate reduction, new home mortgages with $1,000 cash back, and a Visa credit card with 1.90% intro APR for 12 months. Beyond deposits and lending, they offer notary services, safe deposit boxes, money orders, cashier checks, instant-issue debit cards, a 24-hour ATM, free coin counting for members, and wire transfers. What distinguishes RadiFi's Westside branch is its hyper-local community focus and personalized staffing model. The branch employs titled "Member Success" professionals rather than generic tellers, maintains a dedicated mortgage originator (Erika Baker, NMLS #989622) and commercial loan officer (Christopher Condon, NMLS #252916), and offers a wealth advisor through LPL Financial. The branch team has been described in recent reviews as courteous and welcoming, with a 4.2-star rating across 271 certified reviews. They also run a referral program offering $25 for member referrals. The primary caveat is that credit union membership eligibility may be restricted—the website does not specify membership requirements, which are common at credit unions (employer affiliation, geographic location, or sponsor relationships). Additionally, while competitive rates are advertised, APYs on deposit products are subject to promotional periods and require specific minimum deposits. The branch operates traditional hours (9 AM–5 PM weekdays, 9 AM–1 PM Saturday), limiting after-hours access to the 24-hour ATM only.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: High-yield deposit products: 13-month CDs at 3.75% APY and checking up to 4.00% APY are competitive for credit union offerings
Dedicated mortgage team: On-site Digital Mortgage Originator (NMLS #989622) eliminates referral friction for home loans
Personalized staffing: Member Success Managers and Advocates rather than impersonal tellers suggest relationship-focused service
Full-service branch: Offers 14+ services in-person including notary, safe deposit, money orders, and instant-issue debit cards
Strong local reputation: 4.2-star rating across 271 verified reviews with consistent praise for courtesy and service
Military-friendly location: Proximity to Naval Air Station Jacksonville and explicit marketing to military families
Member referral incentive: $25 cash reward for successful member referrals shows retention focus
cons: Membership eligibility unclear: Website does not specify who can join; credit unions often have employment or sponsor restrictions that exclude some consumers
Limited evening hours: Drive-up closes at 5 PM most days (6 PM Friday only); no 24-hour staffed service for loan applications or complex transactions
Promotional rate expiration: Certificate special and intro credit card APR are time-limited; ongoing rates not disclosed
No mention of digital-only account opening verification: Mobile app mentioned but account opening process online not detailed
Minimum deposit requirements: CD special requires $2,500 minimum; no low-barrier savings options mentioned for underbanked consumers
best_for: Military members and families stationed at or near Naval Air Station Jacksonville seeking community-focused credit union banking
Homebuyers in Westside Jacksonville looking for in-person mortgage origination with local branch support
Existing credit union members seeking competitive CD yields (3.75% APY) and high-yield checking (4.00% APY)
Small business owners in Jacksonville: dedicated commercial loan officer and business services specialist on staff
diagnosis: RadiFi Credit Union – Westside Branch is best for military families, homebuyers, and existing credit union members in the Jacksonville area seeking competitive yields and personalized service from a community-focused institution. The main caveat is that membership eligibility is unstated (typical credit union restriction), and consumers should verify they qualify before applying; additionally, after-hours service is limited to ATM access only.
services: Certificate of deposit (13-month term at 3.75% APY)
Personal auto loans with refinancing (0.25% rate reduction special)
Residential mortgage loans (on-site originator; $1,000 cash back promotion)
Visa credit cards (1.90% intro APR for 12 months)
Wealth advisory services (through LPL Financial partnership)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: RadiFi Credit Union's Westside Jacksonville branch offers membership-based banking with checking, savings, loans, and mortgages since 1935.
